title: Corruption cops swoop on Latvian agriculture minister
summary_full: Armands Krauze, Minister of Agriculture and leader of the Union of Greens and Farmers (ZZS), as well as the former State Secretary of the Ministry of Agriculture, Raivis Kronbergs, who is currently head of the State Chancellery, have been temporarily detained in legal proceedings, Latvian Television confirmed at the prosecutor’s office on Thursday, May 14.
